title: The Hollowing of Ravenmoor
_doc: 'The Hollowing of Ravenmoor' — a 3-act undead-mystery adventure (areas + custom cast, kept OUT of data/npcs/). Seeded by engine/ravenmoor.py at world start like the Sunken Tome. The quest chain (q_ravenmoor_hollow -> q_ravenmoor_barrow -> q_ravenmoor_reckoning) lives in data/quests.json, given by Elder Maeve, with a branching Destroy/Lay-to-Rest/Claim finale.

areas.name: Ravenmoor
areas.legend: A grey moorland village of turf-roofed cottages, its folk hollow-eyed and afraid — each dawn another neighbour will not wake.

areas.name: Corvin's Cottage
areas.legend: The grave-robber Corvin Vane's abandoned croft on the moor's edge, its door hanging open, cold ash in the hearth.

areas.name: The Sunken Barrow
areas.legend: A green mound sunk into the moor, its stone door forced from within. Older than the village, older than the road — and no longer sleeping.

elder_maeve.name: Elder Maeve
elder_maeve.description: The stooped elder of Ravenmoor, her hands never still. She has buried too many neighbours this month, and carries a guilt she will not name — for she knew the old barrow was cursed, and said nothing when Corvin went digging.
goals: End the hollowing before Ravenmoor is emptied
Atone for the silence that doomed us

sister_alenn.name: Sister Alenn
sister_alenn.description: A road-worn cleric of the dawn who came to Ravenmoor following the cold. She knows the rites to lay the restless dead — and will teach the trick of it to any who help her tend the fallen.
goals: Lay the hollowed dead to their rest
See the barrow-wight quieted, not just destroyed

resolved: With Aedelric laid to rest, the hollowed dead of Ravenmoor lie still at last, and the moor road is safe once more.
